title: Tom's Structures
body:
- This mod adds new structures with unique loot to your world. Discover exciting, cozy, and interesting structures and have fun looting!
- Currently, the mod only supports the overworld, but nether structures and end structures will be added in updates.
- ## Some structures contain items that were only added in later versions; for example, if you are using this mod in a version prior to 1.21.9 (i.e., 1.21.8 or older), all chests containing copper tools in your world will be empty.

# This mod requires "Tom's Loot" to start.
- The probabilities of items in chests **can vary** depending on the **[version of "Tom's Loot"](https://modrinth.com/mod/toms-loot/changelog)**. Please pay **attention to [changes](https://modrinth.com/mod/toms-loot/changelog)** in the loot tables of **"Tom's Loot"**.
